name: GLYCOGEN STORAGE DISEASE
definition: autosomal recessive diseases with varying severity and clinical syndromes (13 different abnormal metabolism with enlargement of myocardial cells ← glycogen deposition; similar

demographics.Etiology: defect in glucose-6-phosphatase with excess deposition of glycogen in liver,

distribution: increased cortical + medullary echogenicity ← nephrocalcinosis, nephrolithiasis
discriminating_features: increased cortical + medullary echogenicity ← nephrocalcinosis, nephrolithiasis

Kidney: increased cortical + medullary echogenicity ← nephrocalcinosis, nephrolithiasis

clinical.Prognosis: death in infancy, may survive into adulthood with early therapy
